user.title: Configure UK Rail Boards National Rail
user.description: Enter your raildata.org.uk API key and the 3-letter CRS code for the station you want to monitor.

data.crs: Station CRS code (e.g. WAT, SAT, STP)

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key — please check your raildata.org.uk subscription.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the National Rail API. Check your network and try again.
